scripts.dev:browser:postgres:unified-process:sta: node scripts/knowledgebase-dev.mjs --target browser --deployment-profile standalone --service-layout unified-process --database postgres --dev-env-file .env.postgres
scripts.dev:browser:sqlite: node scripts/knowledgebase-dev.mjs --target browser --deployment-profile standalone --service-layout unified-process --database sqlite
scripts.dev:browser:postgres:split-services:clou: node scripts/knowledgebase-dev.mjs --target browser --deployment-profile cloud --service-layout split-services --database postgres --dev-env-file .env.postgres
scripts.dev:desktop:postgres:unified-process:sta: node scripts/knowledgebase-dev.mjs --target desktop --deployment-profile standalone --service-layout unified-process --database postgres --dev-env-file .env.postgres
scripts.dev:desktop:sqlite: node scripts/knowledgebase-dev.mjs --target desktop --deployment-profile standalone --service-layout unified-process --database sqlite
scripts.check: pnpm check:architecture-alignment && pnpm check:pnpm-script-standard && pnpm check:agent-workflow-standard && pnpm check:okf-standard
scripts.clean: cargo clean && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const dir of ['artifacts','target']) { if (fs.existsSync(dir)) fs.rmSync(dir,{recursive:true,force:true}); }"
